data.title: Insider-Linked Vehicle Investindesign Builds Position in Dexelance Shares
data.description:

An announcement from Tamburi Investment Partners Spa ( (IT:TIP) ) is now available.

Investindesign S.p.A., a legal entity closely associated with Dexelance S.p.A. director Giovanni Tamburi, has carried out a series of on‑market purchases of Dexelance ordinary shares. The trades, executed throughout the day at prices ranging roughly from €2.98 to €3.08, indicate incremental accumulation of Dexelance stock by a party linked to the company’s leadership.

The transactions consolidate several small tranches into a meaningful aggregated volume, signalling continuing insider‑linked confidence in Dexelance’s equity at current market levels. Such buying activity may be interpreted by investors as a positive signal regarding management’s view of the company’s prospects, potentially supporting sentiment and liquidity in the stock.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:TIP) stock is a Buy with a EUR11.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tamburi Investment Partners Spa stock, see the IT:TIP Stock Forecast page.

More about Tamburi Investment Partners Spa

Dexelance S.p.A. is an Italian listed company whose ordinary shares trade under ISIN IT0005543480. It operates under the governance of a board that includes director Giovanni Tamburi, a prominent Italian financier, and is part of the broader investment ecosystem around Tamburi Investment Partners and related vehicles.

Average Trading Volume: 265,034

data.title: BaTeLab to Host 2025 Annual Results Conference for Investors
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

The latest update is out from BaTeLab Co., Ltd. ( (HK:2149) ).

BaTeLab Co., Ltd. has announced that it will hold its 2025 annual results conference via phone dial-in on Friday, 10 April 2026 at 4:30 p.m. Beijing time, aiming to give investors a deeper understanding of its financial performance and operations. The move underscores the company’s efforts to enhance transparency and engagement with shareholders and the broader investment community across Mainland China and Hong Kong, reflecting a continued focus on communication as it navigates its listed-company obligations.

The conference will be accessible to investors in both Mainland China and Hong Kong through designated phone lines, with advance registration required to obtain the necessary access code. By formalizing this investor call as a voluntary announcement, BaTeLab signals its intention to maintain proactive disclosure practices, which may help support investor confidence and market perception ahead of the detailed release of its 2025 annual results.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2149) stock is a Hold with a HK$49.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BaTeLab Co., Ltd. stock, see the HK:2149 Stock Forecast page.

More about BaTeLab Co., Ltd.

BaTeLab Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2149. The company operates in the technology and laboratory solutions sector, with its management and board based in Suzhou, and it targets investors in both Mainland China and Hong Kong through the public capital markets.

data.title: Truecaller Halts 2026 Buybacks After Repurchasing 2.7 Million B Shares in Week 14
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Truecaller AB Class B ( ($SE:TRUE.B) ) is now available.

Truecaller has repurchased 2.7 million of its own Class B shares during week 14 of 2026, equal to 0.76% of its outstanding capital, under its ongoing buyback programme running until the 2026 AGM. The company has now accumulated 18.33 million B shares in the current programme and holds a total of 7.71% of its share capital in treasury after halting repurchases ahead of its first-quarter 2026 interim report.

All buybacks were executed on Nasdaq Stockholm by DNB Carnegie and are carried out under an authorization allowing Truecaller to hold up to 10% of its shares. Cumulatively across several programmes since 2022, Truecaller has repurchased more than 48.2 million shares for about SEK 1.42 billion, signaling continued capital-return efforts and active balance-sheet management for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:TRUE.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Truecaller AB Class B stock, see the SE:TRUE.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Truecaller AB Class B

Truecaller AB is a Sweden-based technology company that operates a global platform for verifying contacts and blocking unwanted communication. Its service underpins safer, more relevant conversations for nearly 500 million active users, with a particular focus on combating fraud and spam in digital economies, especially in emerging markets, and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

Average Trading Volume: 3,131,209

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Industrial and Commercial Bank of China ( (HK:1398) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Industrial and Commercial Bank of China Limited has called its first extraordinary shareholders’ meeting of 2026 for 23 April in Beijing, where investors will vote on the audited accounts for 2025 and the profit distribution plan, as well as the fixed asset investment budget for 2026. The board has recommended a 2025 year-end cash dividend of RMB0.1689 per share for ordinary shareholders, with a proposed payment by mid-June 2026 to investors on record in May, underscoring the bank’s continued capital return policy while it sets spending priorities for the coming year.

The meeting arrangements outline key cutoff dates for H-share register closure, procedures for registering share transfers to qualify for attendance and dividends, and detailed proxy and reply slip requirements for shareholders. These mechanics, including timelines for lodging proxy forms and the need for identification at the venue, highlight the bank’s efforts to facilitate shareholder participation and ensure compliance with Hong Kong listing and corporate governance norms.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1398) stock is a Hold with a HK$7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Industrial and Commercial Bank of China stock, see the HK:1398 Stock Forecast page.

More about Industrial and Commercial Bank of China

Industrial and Commercial Bank of China Limited is a major state-owned commercial bank incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 1398. The bank provides a broad range of banking and financial services to retail and institutional clients, and maintains a significant presence in both domestic and international capital markets.

data.title: Ferretti Sends Updated Response as Board Splits Over KKCG Maritime Tender Offer
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ferretti S.p.A. ( (IT:YACHT) ) has shared an announcement.

Ferretti S.p.A. has despatched a response document supplement to its shareholders regarding KKCG Maritime’s voluntary conditional partial public tender offer for up to 15.4% of its share capital. The document, sent under Hong Kong Takeovers Code rules, updates investors on the terms of the revised consideration and the latest views from the company’s advisers and independent directors.

The independent financial adviser Altus Capital considers the revised offer price unattractive, concluding the bid is not fair and not reasonable for independent shareholders. A majority of the independent board committee members agree and urge shareholders not to tender, but two members, Piero Ferrari and Stefano Domenicali, dissent and recommend accepting, highlighting a clear split at board level that may influence how investors respond to the offer.

More about Ferretti S.p.A.

Ferretti S.p.A. is an Italian joint-stock company operating in the marine sector, with its shares listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 09638. The company’s share capital structure has attracted interest from strategic investors, including KKCG Maritime, which has launched a partial public tender offer to increase its stake in Ferretti.

For a thorough assessment of YACHT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

ImmuPharma ( (GB:IMM) ) has shared an announcement.

ImmuPharma shareholders have approved two resolutions at a general meeting, authorising directors to allot new equity securities in support of a previously announced fundraising and retail offer. Following the vote, the board allotted a total of 121,187,447 new ordinary shares, which are expected to be admitted to trading on AIM on 8 April 2026.

On admission of the new shares, ImmuPharma’s issued share capital will rise to 623,911,379 ordinary shares, all carrying one voting right and ranking pari passu with existing stock. The enlarged capital base reflects the company’s ongoing reliance on equity markets to finance its pipeline, with the new shares affecting ownership percentages and disclosure thresholds for existing and prospective investors under FCA transparency rules.

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Green Stream Holdings ( (GSFI) ) has issued an update.

Green Stream Holdings underwent a leadership transition in March 2026, when officer and director James C. DiPrima resigned from his roles on March 17 and March 19, respectively. On March 18, real estate professional Phil Yang was appointed vice president, chief executive officer, secretary, treasurer, and director, consolidating key executive functions under a single new leader.

Yang brings experience overseeing mortgage processing at Direct Mortgage Investors, Inc. between 2019 and 2023, focusing on residential products such as Conventional, FHA, and VA loans. His background in private mortgage lending outside agency guidelines and recent efforts to acquire commercial assets in Rochester, New York, and Washington, D.C., suggest a potential strategic tilt toward more active real estate investment and structured finance initiatives for the company.

More about Green Stream Holdings

Green Stream Holdings operates in the real estate and financial services arena, with a focus on real estate ventures spanning residential lending, commercial asset acquisition, and private mortgage financing. Through executives with experience in mortgage processing and commercial property investment, the company is positioned to leverage both conventional lending channels and higher-yield, non-agency financing opportunities.

data.title: Opus Genetics Secures Major Non-Dilutive Funding Facility
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Opus Genetics ( (IRD) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 2, 2026, Opus Genetics entered into a senior secured note purchase agreement providing access to up to $155 million in non-dilutive funding from Oberland Capital, with $105 million committed and an initial $35 million tranche expected to close on April 20, 2026. The seven-year notes, partially interest-only and secured by substantially all company assets, include a limited conversion feature into common stock at $6.72 per share and are structured around milestone-based tranches, including those tied to regulatory progress for lead gene therapy OPGx-LCA5.

Concurrently on April 2, 2026, the company agreed to a $5 million private placement of 1,116,070 common shares at $4.48 each, with anti-dilution protection for investors if future equity is issued below that price and a commitment by Opus to register the resale of these securities. Together with roughly $100 million of existing cash, the financing is expected to extend Opus’s runway into 2029, enabling acceleration of its inherited retinal disease pipeline—including pivotal studies and potential approvals for OPGx-LCA5 and OPGx-BEST1 and planned clinic entries for RDH12, MERTK, and RHO programs—while reinforcing its position in gene therapy and reducing near-term funding risk for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IRD) stock is a Hold with a $4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Opus Genetics stock, see the IRD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IRD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IRD is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (declining revenue, large losses, and accelerating cash burn). This is partially offset by strong technical positioning (price above key moving averages with positive MACD) and supportive corporate developments, including recent financing and pipeline milestone progress. Valuation is a secondary drag given negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on IRD stock, click here.

More about Opus Genetics

Opus Genetics Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing gene therapies to restore vision and prevent blindness in patients with inherited retinal diseases. Its pipeline includes seven AAV-based programs led by OPGx-LCA5 and OPGx-BEST1, alongside additional candidates targeting RHO, CNGB1, RDH12, NMNAT1, and MERTK, as well as a small-molecule ophthalmic therapy.

The company targets severe retinal disorders with one-time, durable genetic treatments and is also advancing Phentolamine Ophthalmic Solution 0.75% beyond its approved use for pharmacologically induced mydriasis. Based in Research Triangle Park, N.C., Opus operates in a niche, high-unmet-need segment of ophthalmology, positioning itself as a specialist player in inherited retinal disease gene therapy.

Average Trading Volume: 941,757

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $323.7M

For a thorough assessment of IRD stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: AITX Raises Hardware Prices, Standardizes SARA AI Security
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions ( (AITXD) ) has issued an update.

On April 7, 2026, AITX and its Robotic Assistance Devices unit announced an approximately 14% price increase on their hardware lineup, effective May 1, 2026, after nearly three years of absorbing higher component, logistics, and compliance costs, with existing contracts grandfathered and orders placed by April 30, 2026, still eligible for current rates. The move is intended to align pricing with the company’s cost base and could begin to bolster gross margins in fiscal Q3 2027, while RAD simultaneously raises the value proposition by making its SARA autonomous agent standard on all devices, effectively upgrading each deployment from simple detection hardware to an active AI security node.

This strategic combination of higher pricing and richer default functionality positions AITX to improve profitability without undermining its competitive standing in the AI security market, signaling a shift from customer-subsidized cost absorption to more sustainable economics. For customers and channel partners, the April 30, 2026, deadline creates a near-term incentive to lock in lower pricing, while longer term the integrated SARA capability sets a new baseline for automation, consistency, and operational impact that could differentiate RAD’s solutions from traditional manned guarding and less advanced electronic security offerings.

The most recent analyst rating on (AITXD) stock is a Sell with a $0.05 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions stock, see the AITXD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AITXD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AITXD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial fundamentals—large ongoing losses, negative equity, and continued cash burn—despite strong revenue growth. Corporate events are a clear positive (orders, licenses, integrations), but without technical signals and with a loss-driven (negative) P/E and no dividend data, overall risk remains elevated.

To see Spark’s full report on AITXD stock, click here.

More about Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions

Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions, Inc. (AITX), based in Detroit, is an innovator in AI-driven security, automation, and productivity solutions delivered largely through its Robotic Assistance Devices subsidiaries. Its Solutions-as-a-Service model uses stationary and mobile autonomous systems to augment or replace human guards, targeting the nearly $50 billion U.S. security and guarding services market with in-house developed hardware, analytics, and software.

AITX’s platforms integrate with leading monitoring software such as Immix and are validated by a SOC 2 Type 2 audit, helping it win enterprise and government clients that require strict data protection and compliance. The company maintains a robust pipeline including more than 35 Fortune 500 prospects across sectors such as transportation, critical infrastructure, education, and healthcare, aiming to build recurring revenue from large-scale deployments of its AI-enabled devices and SARA agent platform.

Average Trading Volume: 5,068,370

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $11.52M

The latest update is out from Aroundtown SA ( (DE:AT1) ).

Aroundtown SA disclosed that it repurchased 8,656,175 of its own shares between 30 March and 2 April 2026 under its ongoing share buyback programme, which commenced on 26 January 2026. The transactions were executed via a mandated bank across the Xetra, CBOE Europe, Turquoise Europe and Aquis Exchange Europe trading venues at a volume-weighted average price of €2.352 per share.

The latest tranche of buybacks underscores the company’s continued use of excess liquidity to support its share price and optimise its capital structure, a notable step amid a challenging European property market. Concentrating purchases on major European trading platforms may also enhance liquidity in the stock and signal confidence from the board in the company’s valuation and long-term prospects for shareholders.

More about Aroundtown SA

Aroundtown SA is a real estate company focused on income-generating properties, primarily in Germany and other European markets. The group typically invests in and manages commercial and residential assets, targeting stable cash flows and value creation through active portfolio management and capital markets activity.
